name_cn:
# 🔥Best-selling Ophida Envelope Bag#
▫️Model:503877(Original Leather)
▫️Size:26*17.5*8cm
A sales king 👑 Classic premium faux canvas with jacquard tapestry stripes, brown leather trim, an oval leather label on the front, and gold double-G hardware with a magnetic closure. It features a silk lining and two compartments. Large capacity with a chain shoulder strap. The bag opens like a fan, very aesthetic. No wonder it is so hot and sought after in the market 🔥🔥
